zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Pope於1555年10月22日出生在英國薩默塞特丘 馬尼亞時，他的父親John  William Pope26歲，母親Margaret Woodward20歲。他於1575年與Patience Alice Blakie在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1583年6月22日在英國米德萊可武斯布利其享年27歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可武斯布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Pope于1555年10月22日出生在英国薩默塞特丘 馬尼亞时，他的父亲John  William Pope26岁，母亲Margaret Woodward20岁。他于1575年与Patience Alice Blakie在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1583年6月22日在英国米德萊可武斯布利其享年27岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可武斯布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Pope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English pope (derived via Old English from Late Latin papa ‘bishop, pope’, from Greek pappas ‘father’, in origin a nursery word.) In the early Christian Church, the Latin term was at first used as a title of respect for male clergy of every rank, but in the Western Church it gradually came to be restricted to bishops, and then only to the bishop of Rome; in the Eastern Church it continued to be used of all priests (see Popov , Papas ). The nickname would have been used for a vain or pompous man, or for someone who had played the part of the pope in a pageant or play. The surname is also present in Ireland and Scotland.

variants.name: Popov
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Nikolay, Oleg, Grigoriy, Anatoly, Andrei, Arkadi, Dmitriy, Mikhail, Sergey.  Bulgarian or Macedonian Atanas, Dimitar, Yordan.  Serbian Bosko, Bozidar, Branko.

Russian, Bulgarian, Macedonian, Serbian, and Rusyn: patronymic from pop ‘priest’, from Greek pappas ‘father’ (compare English Pope ). The name may sometimes derive from a nickname, but celibacy was not enjoined on priests of the Orthodox Church and so the name can indeed mean ‘son of the priest’. In many cases, however, the Russian name means no more than ‘of the priest’ and designates a servant of a priest. Compare Popoff , see also Pop 2, Popovic , and Popovski 1.
Jewish (American): most likely a shortened form of   Popovski   2. Compare   Popoff  .

variants.name: Papke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Otto, Willi.
North German (also Päpke): nickname from a diminutive of Low German pape, Dutch paepe ‘pope’. Compare Pope .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Pope was born on 22 October 1555, in Chew Magna, Somerset, England, his father, John  William Pope, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Woodward, was 20. He married Patience Alice Blakie in 1575, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 22 June 1583, in Uxbridge, Middlesex, England, at the age of 27, and was buried in Uxbridge, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Pope est né le 22 octobre 1555, à Chew Magna, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John  William Pope, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Woodward, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Patience Alice Blakie en 1575, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 22 juin 1583, à Uxbridge, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Uxbridge, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1575 in Derbyshire, England Patience Alice Blakie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 22. Juni 1583 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Uxbridge, Middlesex, England und wurde in Uxbridge, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pope è nato il il 22 ottobre 1555 nel Chew Magna, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John  William Pope, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Woodward, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Patience Alice Blakie nel 1575, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 22 giugno 1583, nel Uxbridge, Middlesex, England, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Uxbridge, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Popeが1555年10月22日にイギリスソメルセトチェウ マグナで生まれた時，父John  William Popeは26歳，母Margaret Woodwardは20歳であった。1575年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでPatience Alice Blakieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1583年6月22日にイギリスミッドレセックスウクスブリッジで27歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウクスブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Pope(이)가 1555년 10월 22일 영국 서머세트 체w 매그나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John  William Pope(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Woodward(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1575년 영국 더비실르에서 Patience Alice Blakie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1583년 6월 22일 영국 미들레세스 스브리지에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pope nasceu em 22 de outubro de 1555, em Chew Magna, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John  William Pope, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Woodward, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Patience Alice Blakie em 1575, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 22 de junho de 1583, em Uxbridge, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Uxbridge, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Pope родился 22 октября 1555 г. в местности чю магна, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John  William Pope было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Woodward, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Patience Alice Blakie в 1575 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 22 июня 1583 г. в местности уксбридж, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности уксбридж, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.
